case_title: MALLEN, CARRIE VS CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS CASE BECAUSE OF IMPROPER VENUE IS GRANTED. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO LET PLAINTIFF FILE IN PROPER COURT (SAN MATEO COUNTY). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MALLEN, CARRIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT. VENUE TO REDWOOD CITY, SAN MATEO COUNTY. NOTICE OF CHALLENGE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY PLTF. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.
